zh.lifeSummary: 當Herluin de Conteville於1001年出生在法國諾門迪艾孔特維爾時，他的父親Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh32歲，母親Mrs Jean De Conteville27歲。他於大約1029年與Herleva de Falaise結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1066年在法國諾門迪艾享年65歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herluin de Conteville于1001年出生在法国諾門迪艾孔特維爾时，他的父亲Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh32岁，母亲Mrs Jean De Conteville27岁。他于大约1029年与Herleva de Falaise结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1066年在法国諾門迪艾享年65岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Herluin de Conteville was born in 1001, in Conteville, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh, was 32 and his mother, Mrs Jean De Conteville, was 27. He married Herleva de Falaise about 1029. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1066, in Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herluin de Conteville est né en 1001, à Conteville, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs Jean De Conteville, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Herleva de Falaise environ 1029. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1066, à Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herluin de Conteville 1001 in Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh 32 und seine Mutter Mrs Jean De Conteville 27. Er hat um 1029 Herleva de Falaise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1066 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herluin de Conteville è nato il nel 1001 nel Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Jean De Conteville, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Herleva de Falaise circa 1029. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1066, nel Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Herluin de Contevilleが1001年にフランスノーマンディエウアコンテヴィルで生まれた時，父Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburghは32歳，母Mrs Jean De Contevilleは27歳であった。約1029年にHerleva de Falaiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1066年にフランスノーマンディエウアで65歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアファトウヴィレ-グレスティインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Herluin de Conteville(이)가 1001년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘테빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Jean De Conteville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1029년 Herleva de Falaise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년 프랑스 노먼디 우르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 팻우비레-그레스테인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herluin de Conteville nasceu em 1001, em Conteville, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Jean De Conteville, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Herleva de Falaise aproximadamente 1029. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1066, em Eure, Normandie, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herluin de Conteville родился в 1001 г. в местности контевилл, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Jean De Conteville, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Herleva de Falaise около 1029 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1066 г. в местности эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности фатоувилле-грестеин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herluin de Conteville nació en 1001, en Conteville, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean de Conteville Viscount of Comyn, Baron of Conteville and Tonsburgh, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs Jean De Conteville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Herleva de Falaise aproximadamente 1029. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1066, en Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
